name: Dark Magician
desc: ''The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.''

name: Dark Magician
desc: ''The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.''

name: Dark Magician Girl
desc: Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in the GY.

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
desc: ''A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.''

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
desc: ''A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.''

name: Celtic Guardian
desc: An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

name: Curse of Dragon
desc: A wicked dragon that taps into dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

name: Feral Imp
desc: A playful little fiend that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

name: Beaver Warrior
desc: What this creature lacks in size it makes up for in defense when battling in the prairie.

name: Giant Soldier of Stone
desc: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

name: Mystical Elf
desc: A delicate elf that lacks offense, but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

name: Kuriboh
desc: During damage calculation, if your opponent's monster attacks (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; you take no battle damage from that battle.

name: Kuriboh
desc: During damage calculation, if your opponent's monster attacks (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; you take no battle damage from that battle.

name: Kuriboh
desc: During damage calculation, if your opponent's monster attacks (Quick Effect): You can discard this card; you take no battle damage from that battle.

name: Summoned Skull
desc:
A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

(This card is always treated as an "Archfiend" card.)

name: Mammoth Graveyard
desc: A mammoth that protects the graves of its pack and is absolutely merciless when facing grave-robbers.

name: Silver Fang
desc: A snow wolf that's beautiful to the eye, but absolutely vicious in battle.

name: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1
desc: A dragon commonly found guarding mountain fortresses. Its signature attack is a sweeping dive from out of the blue.

name: Black Luster Soldier
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Black Luster Ritual".

name: Magician of Black Chaos
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Black Magic Ritual".

name: Buster Blader
desc: Gains 500 ATK for each Dragon monster your opponent controls or is in their GY.

name: Big Shield Gardna
desc: When a Spell Card is activated that targets this face-down card (and no other cards) (Quick Effect): Change this card to face-up Defense Position, and if you do, negate the activation. If this card is attacked, change it to Attack Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Swords of Revealing Light
desc: After this card's activation, it remains on the field, but you must destroy it during the End Phase of your opponent's 3rd turn. When this card is activated: If your opponent controls a face-down monster, flip all monsters they control face-up. While this card is face-up on the field, your opponent's monsters cannot declare an attack.

name: Monster Reborn
desc: Target 1 monster in either GY; Special Summon it.

name: Pot of Greed
desc: Draw 2 cards.

name: Graceful Charity
desc: Draw 3 cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Dark Hole
desc: Destroy all monsters on the field.

name: Raigeki
desc: Destroy all monsters your opponent controls.

name: Polymerization
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Polymerization
desc: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Thousand Knives
desc: If you control "Dark Magician": Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.

name: Dark Magic Attack
desc: If you control "Dark Magician": Destroy all Spells and Traps your opponent controls.

name: Magical Hats
desc: During your opponent's Battle Phase: Choose 2 Spell/Trap Cards from your Deck and 1 monster in your Main Monster Zone. Special Summon them as Normal Monsters (ATK 0/DEF 0) in face-down Defense Position, Set the chosen monster if it is face-up, and shuffle them on the field. The 2 cards chosen from your Deck are destroyed at the end of the Battle Phase, and cannot remain on the field except during this Battle Phase.

name: Mirror Force
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters.

name: Spellbinding Circle
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack or change its battle position. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Mystic Box
desc: Target 1 monster your opponent controls and 1 monster you control; destroy the first target, then give control of the second target to your opponent.

name: Book of Secret Arts
desc: A Spellcaster-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Multiply
desc: Tribute 1 face-up "Kuriboh"; Special Summon as many "Kuriboh Tokens" (Fiend/DARK/Level 1/ATK 300/DEF 200) as possible, in Defense Position. They cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon.

name: Black Luster Ritual
desc: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Black Luster Soldier". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.
